prompt: An ultra-detailed wide-angle rainforest clearing photographed from a very low ground-level perspective, with the camera almost at the edge of a shallow muddy puddle. Dense tropical jungle vegetation forms a circular wall around the clearing, with tangled vines, broad wet leaves, shrubs, and tree trunks heavily covered in greenery. The foreground is slick with brown water, leaf litter, and reflective puddles, including a fallen branch stretching diagonally across the lower right area and a rounded mossy rock on the lower left. The center opens into a patch of low green plants, while the background rises into thick jungle canopy. Bright midday sunlight breaks through the treetops in the upper right, creating strong rays, haze, glowing highlights, and high contrast against a partly cloudy blue-and-white sky visible through the canopy. Use a dramatic fisheye or ultra-wide lens effect with subtle barrel distortion, immersive environmental scale, rich saturated greens, wet textures, realistic natural lighting, crisp foliage detail, and a photorealistic documentary nature-photography look. Include a faint, unnatural grid-like speckle noise artifact pattern across the image, especially visible in darker foliage and muddy ground, as if from an image-generation quality bug.
